contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Doc: AI/* Gmail label convention in PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL §9.7
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/55
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Documented the four-label Gmail convention (AI/Warm-up, AI/Follow-up, AI/Sent Warm-up, AI/Sent Follow-up) inside `agentic_ai_context/PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md` as a new subsection §9.7. The four labels superseded the legacy single `Email Agent suggestions` label on 2026-04-17, but the protocol doc still described only the legacy label — leaving the convention only in script-level constants.
  
  - `PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md` — added §9.7 covering: per-label table (stage, producer script, purpose), the review→sent auto-swap performed by `sync_email_agent_followup.py`, the constants block as single source of truth, status inference for the `Email Agent Follow Up` log, migration scripts (`relabel_existing_drafts.py`, `label_historical_sent.py`), and cross-reference to the newsletter `Newsletter/<campaign>` namespace.
  - `PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md` — added 2026-04-27 changelog entry.
  - `AGROVERSE_NEWSLETTER_WORKFLOW.md` — sharpened the back-reference from a whole-doc pointer to the specific `PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md` §9.7 anchor.
  
  ## Why
  
  `AGROVERSE_NEWSLETTER_WORKFLOW.md` §2 already cited the four-label convention as "documented in `PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md`" — but the partner protocol doc still named only the legacy single label. Future AI agents (and humans) reading the cited doc would not find the four-label scheme, so the scheme was effectively undocumented outside the scripts. This PR closes the gap so onboarding agents can rely on the protocol doc as authoritative.
  
  ## Scope safety
  
  - Pure additions; no rewrite of existing prose. Designed to land cleanly alongside in-flight `Email Agent Suggestions` → `Email Agent Drafts` tab-rename work in §3 / §9.2 / §9.3 / §9.4 / §9.6 / §10.
  - Branched off `origin/main` (local `main` had a stale auto-chore commit; left untouched).
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/55 (merged, squash commit `03629af`)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
